attributes.action: Ban individuals convicted of terror or hate offences from holding public office
attributes.additional_details: People convicted of terrorism or hate‑motivated offences pose a risk to public trust and democratic integrity. Those who have promoted violence, extremism, or hatred should not be permitted to represent communities or hold public authority. Clear rules are needed to protect public safety and confidence.
attributes.background: Introduce legislation preventing anyone convicted of terrorism offences or hate‑motivated crimes from standing in local elections or holding any public office or local elections.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban anyone convicted of terrorism offences from standing for public office
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759385
